title: clusia belizensis
intro: Clusia belizensis, also known as the Mayan nut tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's seeds, leaves, and bark have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clusia belizensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wound healing and as an insecticide. Herbal preparations of Clusia belizensis include making tea from the leaves or using the bark to create a tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues.
